title: EMPLOYMENT - 211info
text: IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION EMPLOYMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Employment and training services for newly arrived refugees and established refugees and immigrants, including job coaching, placement, retention, and career planning. 10301 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Refugees and immigrants Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 271-6461 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program Phone (971) 271-6461 Program Phone Leisl Wehmueller [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement. IRCO has language resources available to ensure that clients can speak with someone in their own language for all programs. AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Immigrant/Refugee Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INTERNATIONAL LANGUAGE BANK INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SLAVIC AND EASTERN EUROPEAN CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING INFORMATION SERVICES - SENIOR SERVICES LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION LEGAL SERVICES - IMMIGRATION AND COUNSELING MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY PROGRAMS PUBLIC SAFETY - PRESCHOOL FOR ALL EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM TAX ORGANIZATIONS AND SERVICES - TAX SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
